mapper.insert:
SELECT "ISEQ$$_78856".CURRVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO QNA (CUSTOMER_ID, TITLE, CONTENT) VALUES (#{customerId}, #{title}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT Q.*, U.NAME AS CUSTOMER_NAME FROM QNA Q JOIN USERS U ON Q.CUSTOMER_ID = U.ID WHERE Q.ID = #{id}
SELECT Q.*, U.NAME AS CUSTOMER_NAME FROM QNA Q JOIN USERS U ON Q.CUSTOMER_ID = U.ID WHERE Q.CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId} ORDER BY Q.CREATED_AT DESC
SELECT Q.*, U.NAME AS CUSTOMER_NAME FROM QNA Q JOIN USERS U ON Q.CUSTOMER_ID = U.ID ORDER BY Q.CREATED_AT DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE QNA SET ANSWER = #{answer}, ANSWERED_BY = #{answeredBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, ANSWERED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT Q.*, U.NAME AS CUSTOMER_NAME FROM QNA Q JOIN USERS U ON Q.CUSTOMER_ID = U.ID ORDER BY Q.CREATED_AT DESC FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY
